name: Focused Shot
text: Add 1 Hit to your attack roll.

altMode.text: Steady advance: gain +1 movement this activation.

name: Brace for Impact
text: Add 1 Block to your defense roll.

altMode.text: Hunker down: gain +1 Block on the next attack against this figure.
Evasive sprint: gain +2 movement this activation.
Burst of energy: gain +1 action this activation.

name: Suppressive Fire

effects.condition: If you roll at least 1 Hit

text: If you roll at least 1 Hit, the target gains the Suppressed status.

name: Counterstrike
text: Cancel 1 Tactic Card played by your opponent this combat.

name: Precision Strike
text: Add Pierce 1 to your attack (ignores 1 Block).

name: Quick Reflexes
text: Add 1 Evade to your defense roll.

name: Second Wind
text: The active figure gains 1 bonus action point this round.

name: For the Alliance
text: Add 2 Hits to your attack roll.

name: Inspiring Presence
text: Recover 1 Morale point for the Operative side.

strategicEffect.description: An inspiring speech rallies the troops. Recover 3 morale.

strategicEffect.name: Guerrilla Tactics
strategicEffect.text: Ignore the target's cover bonus for this attack.

strategicEffect.description: Local informants reveal enemy positions. Gain intel on enemy deployment.

altMode.text: Hit and run: gain +3 movement this activation.

strategicEffect.name: Last Stand

effects.condition: If defender has 3 or fewer health

strategicEffect.text: If the defender has 3 or fewer health remaining, add 3 Blocks to the defense roll.

strategicEffect.name: Rebel Ingenuity
strategicEffect.text: Draw 2 additional Tactic Cards from the deck.

strategicEffect.description: Resourceful operatives scrounge supplies. Draw 2 extra tactic cards.

strategicEffect.name: Imperial Discipline
strategicEffect.text: Add 2 Blocks to your defense roll.

strategicEffect.name: Overwhelming Numbers

effects.condition: If 2+ friendly figures are adjacent to the target

strategicEffect.text: If you have 2 or more friendly figures adjacent to the target, add 2 Hits to your attack.

strategicEffect.name: Fear and Dead Men
strategicEffect.text: The target must make a Morale check or become Panicked.

strategicEffect.description: Imperial propaganda bolsters troop morale. Recover 2 morale.

strategicEffect.name: Tactical Withdrawal
strategicEffect.text: Move 1 friendly figure up to 2 spaces.

strategicEffect.description: Redeploy a unit to a better position. Move 1 friendly figure up to 4 tiles.

altMode.text: Orderly retreat: gain +2 movement this activation.

strategicEffect.name: Reinforcement Order
strategicEffect.text: Immediately deploy 1 Regular unit to an Imperial deployment zone.

strategicEffect.description: Command orders fresh troops to the front. Gain 4 reinforcement points.

strategicEffect.name: Pinning Fire
strategicEffect.text: Add Suppressed status to the target.

strategicEffect.name: Shield Wall
strategicEffect.text: Add 2 Blocks. Friendly figures adjacent to the defender also gain +1 Block.

strategicEffect.name: Flanking Maneuver

effects.condition: If you have an ally adjacent to the target

strategicEffect.text: If you have an ally adjacent to the target, add 1 Hit to your attack.

strategicEffect.name: Combat Medic
strategicEffect.text: Heal an adjacent friendly figure 3 health.

strategicEffect.name: Frag Grenade
strategicEffect.text: Deal 1 damage to all figures in a 2-space radius of the target.

strategicEffect.name: Smoke Screen
strategicEffect.text: All attacks against friendly figures in an area gain -1 Hit this round.

strategicEffect.name: Overcharge
strategicEffect.text: Add 1 Red die to your attack pool for this attack.

strategicEffect.name: Evasive Maneuvers
strategicEffect.text: Move the defender 1 space after combat resolves.

altMode.text: Defensive posture: gain +2 Block on the next attack against this figure.

strategicEffect.name: Point Blank
strategicEffect.text: If the target is at range 1, add 2 Hits to your attack.
